mapper.select: select user_id from app_auction_bid_log t where t.car_id=#{carId} order by t.bid desc limit 1
select * from app_auction_bid_log t where t.car_id=#{carId} order by t.bid desc limit 1
select user_id as userId,max(t.bid) as bid ,car_id as carId from app_auction_bid_log t where t.car_id=#{carId} group by t.user_id order by bid desc
